title: Dark Delicious Moroccan Lamb Mrouzia
description: A rich and flavorful Moroccan dish featuring lamb, dark soy sauce, and a blend of spices, served in a cast-iron skillet. This recipe is egg-free and features an ice-bath-shock step to create a unique texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the dark soy sauce and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Submerge the skillet in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then serve.
